title: Build
subtitle: Pick a template — spawn a side-chat agent on selection
footer: Each tile kicks off a background Sonnet agent in its own side chat. Watch progress, steer when needed.

choices.label: Web app
choices.description: Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn/ui — SSR, auth, Stripe-ready.

choices.label: API / backend
choices.description: TypeScript Fastify or Hono, Postgres via Supabase, zero-boilerplate.

choices.label: CLI tool
choices.description: Node + commander, figlet banner, test scaffold, publish-ready.

choices.label: Mobile app
choices.description: React Native (Expo) or SwiftUI — routes into ccc-mobile.

choices.label: From a spec
choices.description: Describe the idea in plain English — spec interview → plan → build.
